# singlestoredb_workspace_private_connections_kai (Data Source)

Retrieve private connection Kai service details for a specific workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "singlestoredb" {
  // The SingleStoreDB Terraform provider uses the SINGLESTOREDB_API_KEY environment variable for authentication.
  // Please set this environment variable with your SingleStore Management API key.
  // You can generate this key from the SingleStore Portal at https://portal.singlestore.com/organizations/org-id/api-keys.
}

data "singlestoredb_workspace_private_connections_kai" "this" {
  workspace_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
}

output "workspace_private_connections_kai" {
  value = data.singlestoredb_workspace_private_connections_kai.this
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_id` (String) The unique identifier of the workspace.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `service_name` (String) VPC endpoint service name for Kai.
